title: Knowledge Page Metadata Sidecar
description: Each markdown knowledge page has one JSON sidecar with this schema. Sidecars are regenerated from md frontmatter by scripts/rebuild_sidecars.py (md frontmatter is the single source of truth).

knowledge_id.description: Unique ID, derived from filename slug (lowercase, spaces -> underscores)

path.description: Path to the source markdown file, relative to repo root (e.g. 知识库/xxx.md or knowledge/pages/xxx.md)

description.description: One-line summary copied from md frontmatter (omitted when absent)

source_refs.description: Merged from md frontmatter source/source_url: external references this knowledge was derived from

related.description: Related pages declared in md frontmatter (may be wikilinks or plain page names), kept verbatim

dependencies.description: knowledge_ids this page depends on (for Dependency Graph); maintained manually, not derivable from md

outgoing_links.description: Page names of wikilinks found in the md body ([[page]], [[page|alias]], [[page#anchor]]), deduplicated (for Knowledge Graph)
